description: Synthetic measurement-pipeline pilot only; not evidence of cost savings or quality non-inferiority.
runner_protocol: For each arm, create a fresh session/worktree, materialize only the named material section, use the exact prompt, and collect the declared artifacts and fact IDs.

tasks.prompt: Using pilot-material-v1.json#search_read_01, locate the declaration of resolveLane and list every direct caller. Return file-and-line evidence and the matching expected fact IDs.
rubric: Lists every direct caller in the frozen fixture
Every claim has a traceable file-and-line reference

tasks.prompt: Materialize pilot-material-v1.json#search_read_02 exactly, search for the Chinese phrase 统一验收状态, and report its generated line plus the final surrounding lines and matching fact IDs.
rubric: Returns enough surrounding evidence to verify the match

tasks.prompt: Using pilot-material-v1.json#analyze_diagnosis_01, identify the first causal test failure, distinguish downstream symptoms, and cite exact log lines with matching fact IDs.
rubric: Names the first causal failure rather than a downstream symptom

tasks.prompt: Using pilot-material-v1.json#analyze_diagnosis_02, trace the complete source-to-presenter call path and identify the exact expression that truncates evidence. Return matching fact IDs.
rubric: Traces the data flow across all frozen modules
Does not infer behavior beyond available evidence

tasks.prompt: Review pilot-material-v1.json#review_01 against its spec. Report only actionable defects with tight locations, severity, and matching fact IDs.
Review pilot-material-v1.json#review_02. Detect the declared-scope violation and semantic routing regression, rank them by severity, and return matching fact IDs.
Materialize pilot-material-v1.json#bugfix_01, fix parseItems with the smallest scoped change, run the supplied parser assertion, and return patch/check evidence plus matching fact IDs.
rubric: Regression test fails before and passes after the fix

tasks.prompt: Materialize pilot-material-v1.json#bugfix_02, fix the Windows shell mismatch without a cross-shell pipeline, and provide focused command evidence plus matching fact IDs.
Using pilot-material-v1.json#small_feature_refactor_01, produce the additive Outcome envelope and prove that removing contract_version and outcome deep-equals legacy.json. Return matching fact IDs.
rubric: New field matches the declared contract
Legacy payload remains deeply equal after removing the additive field
Build and focused contract test pass

tasks.prompt: Digest pilot-material-v1.json#test_log_01 while preserving the first causal failure, exact final counts, and a recoverable full-log reference. Return matching fact IDs.
rubric: Provides a recoverable full-output artifact reference
